example_tasks: Bookmark key reference documentation for API
Flag critical bugs for the upcoming release
Highlight key achievements for performance review
Identify top 3 priority goals for Q3
Select featured articles for the newsletter
Mark important emails requiring immediate follow-up
Track milestone completion for project Alpha
Nominate team member for quarterly award
reasoning: The star is a universally recognized symbol for priority, importance, favorites, and ratings. It is highly effective for visually flagging critical tasks or highlighting key milestones in a long list.
